description: Create new work item or project

# Ghostwire: Workflows Create

Create new work item or project.

## Process

1. Define Scope
   - What to create
   - Purpose
   - Success criteria

2. Plan Structure
   - Files needed
   - Dependencies
   - Organization

3. Execute Creation
   - Scaffold files
   - Setup configuration
   - Add initial content

4. Verify
   - Build works
   - Tests pass
   - Ready for use
